case_title: IVAN VICAN VS. PANFILO ARMAS DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2018 BY PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. PLAINTIFF IVAN VICAN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SUSAN VICAN, SPOUSE(WIFE). DEFENDANT PANFILO ARMAS DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CONTRACTOR'S STATE LICENSE BOARD'S REGISTRAR OF CONTRACTORS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROBERT TWOMEY, ENFORCEMENT REP II. PLAINTIFF IS SEEKING TO COLLECT $10,000 FROM JUDGMENT RENDERED AGAINST DEFENDANT PANFILO ARMAS DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY IN S.F.S.C. CASE NUMBER 854784 FROM A CASH BOND THAT WAS DEPOSITED TO CONTRACTOR'S STATE LICENSE BOARD'S REGISTRAR OF CONTRACTOR'S BY PANFILO ARMAS. DEFENDANT CONTRACTOR'S STATE LICENSE BOARD'S REGISTRAR OF CONTRACTOR'S INSTRUCTED TO PLAINTIFF TO FILE THIS CASE NAMING THEM IN ORDER TO OBTAIN AN ORDER OR JUDGMENT INSTRUCTING THE CONTRACTOR'S STATE LICENSE BOARD'S REGISTRAR OF CONTRACTOR'S TO SURRENDER THE MONIES TO PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VICAN, IVAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANFILO ARMAS DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY CONTRACTORS STATE LICENSE BOARD'S REGISTRAR OF CONTRACTORS $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,145.00, REGISTRAR OF THE CONTRACTOR'S STATE LICENSE BOARD AS GUARANTOR DEFENDANT FOR PANFILO ARMAS DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY SHALL PAY $10,000.00 AND PANFILO ARMAS DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY SHALL PAY COSTS $145.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VICAN, IVAN
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF VICAN, IVAN

ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PANFILO ARMAS DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY CONTRACTORS STATE LICENSE BOARD'S REGISTRAR OF CONTRACTORS
